donateView.title: Support KAT Journey
donateView.desc1: If KAT Journey is useful to you, you can send a small coffee to support the creator in further developing the app.
donateView.desc2: Support is optional. Thank you for using KAT Journey.

aboutView.subtitle: Personal Journey Assistant
aboutView.desc: More than just a planning tool, KAT Journey is your companion to help you manage expenses, organize schedules, and fully pack all your memorable moments.
aboutView.techDesc1: KAT Journey is built with React, Vite, Dexie, and Supabase. The system only uses Supabase for syncing and sharing when you actively log in.
aboutView.techDesc2: We would like to express our sincere gratitude to the authors and the open-source community who have accompanied this project.
aboutView.techDesc3: UI and features inspired by TREK & Stippl.

languageView.desc: Choose the display language for KAT Journey.

authView.guestDesc: Your trip data is currently stored only on this device. Sign in with Google to sync to the Cloud and access it across multiple devices.
authView.guestNotice1: All itineraries and expenses are temporarily saved on this device. Please link your account to back up
authView.guestNotice2: to the cloud and unlock the

cloudRestore.title: Restore data from Cloud?
cloudRestore.warning: Data on this device may be changed. Please consider choosing the appropriate restore method below.
cloudRestore.mergeDesc: Keep current data, only add new trips and posts from the backup.
cloudRestore.replaceDesc: Wipe out all data on this device and overwrite with the backup on the Cloud.

fileRestore.title: Restore Data?
fileRestore.warning: Current data may be changed after importing the backup. Please make sure your file is valid before proceeding.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account?
deleteAccount.warning: To confirm, please type DELETE exactly.
deleteAccount.desc: This action will permanently delete your account on the Cloud system and all local storage data. You cannot undo this.
deleteAccount.itemName: Account and all KAT Journey data
deleteAccount.errorAuth: This action requires recent authentication. Please log out and log in again with Google to verify before deleting your account.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: An error occurred while deleting the account. Please try again later.

factoryReset.title: Factory reset?
factoryReset.warning: To confirm, please type DELETE exactly.
factoryReset.desc: This action will permanently delete all data on this device. You cannot undo this.

importPreview.title: Confirm trip import
importPreview.subtitle: Check information before importing
importPreview.notice: Data will be added to this device. Existing trips will not be affected.

privacyView.title: Data Privacy Commitment
privacyView.offlineDesc: All trip details, expenses, and journals are kept safe right in your phone's memory. You can look up your itinerary anytime, anywhere even without a network.
privacyView.identityDesc: The login system is set up for strict identity verification. This ensures your account and all your plans are securely authorized, and only you (the owner) have the right to manage and edit them.
privacyView.noDataDesc: Your itinerary is your own. We commit that no personal information or plans are automatically uploaded to the cloud. Data is only sent to the network when you actively click the Backup or Share trip feature.

auth.title: Account & Sync
auth.dataSyncDesc: Auto backup and secure your data
auth.newerVersionAlert: A newer version is available on the Cloud. Please tap Sync to download.
auth.loginToSync: Please log in to use data sync.

welcomeScreen.heroDesc: Sync data across platforms, manage itineraries, and split expenses instantly.
welcomeScreen.slide1Desc: Plan day by day, pin locations, and visually arrange itineraries with your team.
welcomeScreen.slide2Desc: Record group spending, auto-split bills, and settle payments instantly.
welcomeScreen.slide3Desc: Pack with checklists and write travel journals to keep your meaningful photos.
welcomeScreen.legalTerms: By continuing, you agree to our <0>Terms of Service</0>, <1>Privacy Policy</1>, and <2>Cookie Policy</2>.

modal.terms1Desc: Welcome to KAT Journey! By using the app, we agree to respect common principles to build a civilized travel community. If anything feels inappropriate, you always have the right to stop using the service at any time.
modal.terms2Desc: Your account is where you keep your personal journeys. Help us protect it by keeping your login information (Google account) safe. We always encourage you to secure your personal devices well to avoid data leaks.
modal.terms3Desc: KAT Journey prioritizes storing data directly on your device so you can view your itinerary even when offline. Quick note: Don't rush to clear your web browser data (clear cache) before syncing to the cloud, to avoid losing unfinished plans!
modal.privacy1Title: 1. What do we need to know about you? Very little!
modal.privacy1Desc: KAT Journey only collects a few basic pieces of information (Name, Email, Avatar) from your Google account to act as an "identity passport". This helps you store and sync trips seamlessly across multiple devices.
modal.privacy2Desc: All plans, expenses, and luggage "sleep peacefully" on your device. Only when you actively invite friends via the "Share Trip" feature is the data carefully encrypted and uploaded to the cloud server system with the highest security.
modal.privacy3Desc: You are the "captain" of this account. You have full rights to create, edit, permanently delete trips, or revoke sharing links at any time with just one tap.
modal.cookie1Desc: KAT Journey uses a few "cookies" (Cookies and Local Storage) to remember who you are, which trip you were viewing, and keep you always ready to hit the road without needing to log in multiple times.
modal.cookie2Desc: Your travel planning experience shouldn't be bothered. We commit to only using essential technical cookies for the app to function correctly. KAT Journey absolutely DOES NOT track you or sell your data to any third party.

userMenu.logoutConfirmMessage: You are about to log out of this device. Don't worry, all data backed up to the <1>Cloud</1> will be kept <3>safe</3>.

common.archivedBanner: Trip has ended — read-only, no edits allowed.

weather.packingRain: It's raining at your destination, don't forget an umbrella!
weather.packingRainShort: It's raining at your destination, don't forget an umbrella!
weather.colder: Destination is {{diff}}°C colder than your location. Bring warm clothes!
weather.cooler: Destination is {{diff}}°C cooler than your location. Bring a light jacket.
weather.hotter: Destination is {{diff}}°C hotter than your location. Prepare for heat and sunscreen!
weather.warmer: Destination is {{diff}}°C warmer than your location. Don't forget sunglasses.
weather.colderShort: {{diff}}°C colder than here. Bring warm clothes!
weather.coolerShort: {{diff}}°C cooler than here. Bring a jacket.
weather.noDestinationDesc: Add a destination for your trip to see the weather forecast here.
weather.forecastNotAvailable: Forecast not available yet — {{daysUntil}} days left until the trip. Open-Meteo provides up to 16 days in advance.
weather.noData: Location data not available to update weather
weather.outdoorIdealDesc: Sunny and clear skies. Great for going to the beach, hiking, camping or outdoor photography. Don't forget sunscreen and sunglasses!
weather.coolPleasantDesc: Cloudy and cool, not too hot. Great for walking around the old town, night markets, or sightseeing without getting exhausted.
weather.foggyTitle: Foggy weather, be careful on mountain passes
weather.foggyDesc: Cold air with beautiful fog. Perfect for romantic cafes and hot pot. If driving or riding a motorbike, use warning lights and drive slowly.
weather.rainyTitle: Rain showers, shift to indoor activities
weather.rainyDesc: Wet and rainy. You should prioritize visiting museums, indoor amusement parks, aquariums, cafes, or making souvenirs.
weather.stormDesc: Bad weather with dangerous thunderstorms. Avoid boating, swimming, or going to the forest. Buy food and play board games or watch a movie in your room.
weather.normalDesc: Normal weather conditions. Follow the daily schedule to plan your activities reasonably.

pwaInstallSheet.step1AndroidDesc: Find the 3 dots (⋮) icon usually located at the top right of Chrome or the bottom menu.
pwaInstallSheet.step1IOSDesc: Find the square icon with an upward arrow <icon></icon> on the Safari toolbar at the bottom of the screen.
pwaInstallSheet.step2AndroidDesc: Find and tap the Add to Home screen option (or Install app).
pwaInstallSheet.step2IOSDesc: Scroll down the share menu and tap the option with the plus icon <icon></icon>.
pwaInstallSheet.step3AndroidDesc: Tap the "Add" or "Install" button in the dialog that appears to complete.
pwaInstallSheet.step3IOSDesc: Tap the "Add" button at the top right of the screen to complete.
